__comment: Promotes fields from the shipped JSON so DQL reports per-control pass/fail and failed_count. On OpenPipeline this becomes a DQL processor (PARSE / FIELDS_ADD). VERIFY syntax for your pipeline.
processorDefinition: PARSE(content, "JSON:payload") | FIELDS_ADD(net_role: payload[net_role], compliance_phase: payload[compliance.phase], failed_count: payload[compliance.failed_count])
